company.name: AutoStream
company.description: AutoStream is a SaaS platform providing automated video editing tools for content creators. It uses AI to streamline video production, add captions, and deliver high-quality output at scale.
company.tagline: AI-powered video editing for creators who move fast.

plans.name: Basic Plan
plans.best_for: Individual creators or hobbyists just getting started

plans.name: Pro Plan
plans.best_for: Professional YouTubers, Instagram creators, and agencies

policies.refund_policy: No refunds are provided after 7 days from the date of purchase. Refund requests within the first 7 days are reviewed case-by-case.

support.basic: Email support with 24–48 hour response time
support.pro: 24/7 live chat and email support with priority response

policies.trial: No free trial currently available. A 7-day money-back guarantee applies to first-time subscribers.
policies.cancellation: You can cancel your subscription at any time. Access continues until the end of the current billing period.

faqs.question: What platforms does AutoStream support?
faqs.answer: AutoStream works for creators on YouTube, Instagram, TikTok, and any platform where you upload video content.

faqs.question: Can I upgrade from Basic to Pro?
faqs.answer: Yes, you can upgrade at any time. You will be billed the prorated difference for the remaining billing cycle.

faqs.question: Does AutoStream support team accounts?
faqs.answer: Team or agency plans are not currently listed but you can contact support for custom pricing.

faqs.question: What video formats are supported?
faqs.answer: AutoStream supports MP4, MOV, AVI, and MKV input formats. Output is always in MP4.
